DESCRIPTION: cosmos Dream Catcher (Offline Consolidation)
------------------------------------------------

"Dreaming in 12 dimensions... consolidating the manifold."

This innovative module runs when the system is idle. It performs "Offline Memory Consolidation":
1.  **Synthetic Replay**: Takes recent memories 

CLASSES:
- DreamCatcher
  Methods: async def enter_rem_sleep(self, recent_memories: list[str])

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def demo_dream_mode()
